name: Jay Inslee
subject: Last time I'll ask:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
I'm really down to the wire now, friend.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7aeb8/2f5ea88d/7a73453d/2cbdd816/3971746566/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-fr-freeze-1214?utm_source=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&refcode=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_campaign=freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- this will be the last time I ask before our legally-mandated fundraising freeze. And you know I wouldn't ask unless it was truly critical. We only have 4 hours until our deadline. After that, we're no longer able to raise a single dime for our governor's account until after the legislative session -- a session where I will be fighting for a bold clean energy future, a fair tax code, stellar education, and progressive policies _every single day_. **I don't need to tell you big money and polluting special interests don't want us to succeed. In fact, they're banking on us falling short. Right now, I need you to prove them wrong. Help me show them that we're strong enough to take them.** [**Help push our donor total to 2,000 before midnight TONIGHT.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7aeb8/2f5ea88d/7a73453d/2cbdd816/3971746566/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-fr-freeze-1214?utm_source=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&refcode=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_campaign=freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_medium=ema") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7aeb8/2f5ea88d/7a73453d/2cbdd815/3971746566/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-fr-freeze-1214?utm_source=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&refcode=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_campaign=freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $25 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7aeb8/2f5ea88d/7a73453d/2cbdd814/3971746566/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-fr-freeze-1214?utm_source=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&refcode=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_campaign=freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $50 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7aeb8/2f5ea88d/7a73453d/2cbdd82b/3971746566/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-fr-freeze-1214?utm_source=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&refcode=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_campaign=freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $100 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7aeb8/2f5ea88d/7a73453d/2cbdd82a/3971746566/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-fr-freeze-1214?utm_source=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&refcode=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_campaign=freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---|---
**[Or, donate another amount.](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7aeb8/2f5ea88d/7a73453d/2cbdd829/3971746566/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-fr-freeze-1214?utm_source=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&refcode=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_campaign=freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_medium=ema&amount=other")**
Thank you for everything you've done -- I can't wait to talk policy next week.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7aeb8/2f5ea88d/7a73453d/2cbdd816/3971746566/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-fr-freeze-1214?utm_source=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&refcode=ema_2018-12-14_freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_campaign=freeze-6-kicker-resend&utm_medium=ema")
---

_Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

| [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7aeb8/2f5ea88d/7a73453d/2cbdd828/3971746566/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-contribute-button")
---

name: Trump Headquarters
subject: Critical for 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
We need your immediate response. |
---
| | | | | | | **[Authorized By Trump Headquarters](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c460f1d743f8aa4bdc44ed5152966598c6ced995baac814132db645d5c388705ae117d2decacc750e08f72548230b11d9e1eeef94dd6daae)**

Friend,

The Mainstream Media continue to release polls showing that the American people do not approve of President Trump's job performance.

But when the President went from state to state campaigning at rallys this year, he was overwhelmed by the energy and support from American patriots, like you.

That's why he asked us to launch the **FIRST Official Presidential Job Performance Poll of the 2020 re-elect campaign!**

Friend, since you will be one of the first to take this poll, your response will have a HUGE impact on the results.

**[Please take the poll below before 9:30 PM to show the Mainstream Media what Americans really think.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2120f9cebc9cbe2dbbde5cc112c954d402de14b731bb7bf65415d458309248556604b3863d056434b24784c6ace276929f30b5aef6b04033)**
**How would you rate President Trump 's Job performance?** [GREAT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2120f9cebc9cbe2d0ef90bc60203461fc584138d8a9e58a09e82909fcd38f5c7786b889cbe4dd55c8e01abafb8c3d6e9643812ff26e0485f)
[GOOD](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2120f9cebc9cbe2d0ef90bc60203461fc584138d8a9e58a09e82909fcd38f5c7786b889cbe4dd55c8e01abafb8c3d6e9643812ff26e0485f)
[OKAY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2120f9cebc9cbe2d0ef90bc60203461fc584138d8a9e58a09e82909fcd38f5c7786b889cbe4dd55c8e01abafb8c3d6e9643812ff26e0485f)
[OTHER](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2120f9cebc9cbe2d0ef90bc60203461fc584138d8a9e58a09e82909fcd38f5c7786b889cbe4dd55c8e01abafb8c3d6e9643812ff26e0485f) Thank you for your input. We'll be sure to pass it along to President Trump.

Presidential Polling
Trump Headquarters [TAKE THE POLL NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2120f9cebc9cbe2d0ef90bc60203461fc584138d8a9e58a09e82909fcd38f5c7786b889cbe4dd55c8e01abafb8c3d6e9643812ff26e0485f)

---

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2120f9cebc9cbe2df9cf5f7be745b8892097fa00f5e5b3725f874e6c9cfabc6cb365fda051c5a569e3fbb228fd7552c142a62576dc7b301b) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2120f9cebc9cbe2d8781fe8d626a01d772da3274aa1282de99e90d86c94a575b26536049e9f3742539a334785dd41e5f8a4f10b4c5306c3e) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fc2fa77849ea4069a439b231d8ab67c92ef5a6b3a9b596e98c8a2f96ba369569ce0e8ee25ca380791e7d9edc5143aea1b5344c6209dc7a446f) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256cfa8fea4c3b5f1d42a08220c1fa1b49f9e3785903af774b4573eb9bf3370a738a4cbb378fd7af82d0)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump's Message on Border Security
body:
"When House Democratic leader Nancy Pelosi of California and Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer of New York tried to..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d50e4840b3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Trump Was Right: Transparency a Good Thing in Border Wall Debate with Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f52b54f865&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“When House Democratic leader Nancy Pelosi of California and Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer of New York tried to move their Oval Office debate with President Trump over border wall funding behind closed doors, Trump had the right response,” Philip Klein writes. “It’s not bad, Nancy,” the President said. “It’s called transparency.”

**Watch:** [President Trump's 1 minute message on border security](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=41dfcf5610&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Trump Signs Executive Order Promoting ‘Opportunity Zones’ In Distressed Towns](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c6594a5b6b&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Times_
“Our goal is to ensure that America’s great new prosperity is broadly shared by all of our citizens,” President Trump said after signing an executive order on “Opportunity Zones” in the Roosevelt Room of the White House this week. “We are drawing investment into neglected and underserved communities of America so that all Americans, regardless of zip code, have access to the American Dream.”
---
|
---
| [Rep. Jody Hice: Time is Up, Let's Build the Wall](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=65ce33a986&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“With only a handful of legislative business days left on the books, we have one final chance to live up to the promise that we made to the parents, small business owners, blue collar workers, farmers, teachers, and ordinary people who helped us gain control in the first place. Simply put, it’s time to build the wall,” Rep. Jody Hice (R-GA) writes.
---
|
---
| [First Lady Spreads Anti-Bullying Message at Kids’ Hospital](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=76d90e87c8&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Associated Press_
“Melania Trump spread her anti-bullying message on an annual Christmas season visit to a Washington children’s hospital on Thursday, reading a story about a Christmas ornament named Oliver who is bullied by other ornaments in a family’s collection,” Darlene Superville writes. “Mrs. Trump launched an initiative earlier this year to teach kindness to children, naming it Be Best.”

**Watch** : [First Lady joins Toys for Tots drive earlier this week](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3c28eccdcc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Trump Says Criminal Justice Reform Legislation Will Pass, After McConnell Vows to Bring Bill to Senate Floor](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7a6767c5a9&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
Brooke Singman reports that Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) has vowed to bring the historic criminal justice reform bill endorsed by President Trump to the Senate floor. “Criminal Justice Reform is something people have been working on for many years. It looks like it is going to be passing in a bipartisan way,” President Trump said in the Oval Office this week.
---
|
---
| [The Trump Boom Is No Mere ‘Sugar High’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=775e67fac8&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“Liberals are tripping over themselves to explain why the economy has performed so much better under Donald Trump than it did under Barack Obama,” Stephen Moore writes. “The U.S. growth rate has doubled since Mr. Obama’s last year in office,” and President Trump’s tax cuts have primed the economy for “long-term growth, not a short-term buzz.”
---
|
---
| [Job Openings Back Over 7 Million and Near a Record High](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b8300a9af&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNBC
“There were 1 million more jobs than unemployed workers in the most recent government count of job openings,” Jeff Cox reports. “Total available jobs stood at 7.08 million for October, the second-highest level surpassed only by the 7.3 million in August . . . By comparison, there were just 6.08 million Americans classified as unemployed.”
---
|
---
| [Condemnations of Pittsburgh Massacre by Middle East Nations are Welcomed](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4e0b8b163e&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“In Judaism, following the loss of a loved one, family and neighbors come to visit and comfort the mourners for a period of seven days, known as the shiva period. The second stage of mourning, called the shloshim period, lasts for 30 days,” White House Special Representative for International Negotiations Jason Greenblatt writes. “The families of the 11 Jews murdered in the heinous attack on the Tree of Life synagogue in Pittsburgh Oct. 27 have now marked the end of this 30-day period.”

---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=75b9075fe8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3304e90cb2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=08174034f7)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---
